name: anti-pattern-todo-density
description: anti-pattern cluster [todo-density]: 2 findings across release-assets/v0.7.5/main.js(1) Relay/src/ui/FolderNav.ts(1) — sample: 4 debt markers in single file

Docker bind mounts follow inodes; if the host dir is recreated (rm+mkdir, git checkout rewriting the tree, submodule deinit+reclone) while the container runs, the mount points at a defunct inode and the container sees an empty directory even though docker inspect shows the correct path. We hit this: pb_hooks/ mount went stale after submodule-flatten; token.pb.js stopped firing, /api/oauth2-redirect fell through to PB 0.22 built-in (307 -> oauth2-redirect-failure), breaking all OAuth.
resolution: docker compose up -d --force-recreate <service>. Symptom check: docker exec <ctr> ls <mount-path> vs host ls — if host has files and container sees empty, bind went stale.
